TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Laliavan == u sulit nu Hulam: śčČťáĆšļěÁĀ£ťÉ®ŤźĹ kakilimaan i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Laliavan. u kasalumaluma' nu Laliavan sa, 26 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 83 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 80 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. nilacul u niyazu' nu Paywan(Paiwan) u Paywan(Paiwan) a niyazu' kuyni. katuud ku Paywan(Paiwan) a tademaw itiniay a niyazu', inayay ku Sakizaya itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini mueneng, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541)
S.PHON: == r~…ĺar~…ĺia*an == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ****** kakir~…ĺimaan i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺia*an. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺia*an sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, ** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u nijazu Ē~ ° nu pajwan(paiwan) u pajwan(paiwan) a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. katuud ku pajwan(paiwan) a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu Ē~ °, inajaj ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Laliavan == u sulit nu Hulam: śčČťáĆšļěÁĀ£ťÉ®ŤźĹ kakilimaan i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Laliavan. u kasalumaluma' nu Laliavan sa, 26 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 83 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 80 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. nilacul u niyazu' nu Paywan(Paiwan) u Paywan(Paiwan) a niyazu' kuyni. katuud ku Paywan(Paiwan) a tademaw itiniay a niyazu', inayay ku Sakizaya itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw mueneng itini mueneng, hakay izaw tu, caay henay misumad ku cidekay a ngangan nu Sakizaya. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2019 a mihcan 1 a bulad pulung sausi (566,129), Pangcah (211,279), Tayan (91,021), Paywan (101,560), Yuwatan (58,994), Rukay (13,390), Puyuma (14,358), Cou (6,668), Saysiat (6,676), Yami (4,635), Saw (803), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,859), Sakizaya (961), Sejek (10,202), Laaluwa (405), Kanakanabu (345), zuma (11,541)

r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, ** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u nijazu Ē~ ° nu pajwan(paiwan) u pajwan(paiwan) a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. katuud ku pajwan(paiwan) a tad…ômaw itiniaj a nijazu Ē~ °, inajaj ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, ńßakaj izaw tu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ¶id…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sakizaja. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin
